---
title: "Robotics"
listing:
    id: id_Blog4
    contents: "Blogs/Blogs4/b*/*.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: "date"
    max-items: 15
    image-align: left
    image-placeholder: "Figures/noFigureMessage.jpg"
    date-format: long
    categories: true
    sort-ui: [title, date]
---

Here's a list of Robotics notes.

::: {#id_Blog4}
:::
